name: Web-Shell
summary: Linux-oriented browser shell that uses ba.forkpty for a server-side pseudo-terminal and SMQ plus xterm.js for the browser terminal UI.
use_when: The user wants to study ba.forkpty, PTY lifecycle handling, and browser terminal integration.
The user wants a Linux web shell example that bridges terminal input and output over SMQ.
avoid_when: The target does not include ba.forkpty or a Linux-style shell.
The user needs a safe production remote shell without a full authentication and authorization design.
The user needs a generic Xedge-compatible example.
notes: This example is intentionally Linux/Mako-oriented and should not be exposed without strong access control.
